rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FRANK VICTOR CALCAGNO
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: continued to november 14, 2017 for proper notice. although the hearing was continued to 10/31, the Notice of Hearing shows the hearing date of 10/24, with notice mailed 10/11, which is less than 15 days before 10/24. that notice would have been improper in any case, however, as the petition was not filed until 10/13 (see Local Rule 14.21.A.). New Notice of Hearing must be mailed no later than 10/30 with the new hearing date of 11/14. the proof of service must be filed no later than 11/9 and a file stamped copy of the amended petition provided to the examiner in Room 202 no later than 11/9 (copy provided was not file stamped). finally, counsel must provide a proposed order to the examiner in room 202 by 11/9. NOTE-->faxed or emailed documents are NOT accepted.
